weeks.title: Week 1: Arrays & Strings - Fundamentals
weeks.description: Master array/string manipulation and two-pointer techniques
goals: Master array/string manipulation and two-pointer techniques

days.title: Array Basics & Two Sum
days.description: Arrays, hash maps, brute force vs optimized

tasks.title: LeetCode #1 - Two Sum
tasks.description: Find two numbers that add up to target

tasks.title: LeetCode #167 - Two Sum II (Sorted)
tasks.description: Find two numbers in sorted array that add to target

days.title: Prefix Sums & Running Totals
days.description: Prefix sums, cumulative calculations, range queries

tasks.title: LeetCode #121 - Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
tasks.description: Find max profit with single transaction

tasks.title: LeetCode #238 - Product of Array Except Self
tasks.description: Get product of all elements except current

days.title: Sliding Window - Part 1
days.description: Sliding window technique, character frequency, substring problems

tasks.title: LeetCode #3 - Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
tasks.description: Find longest substring with unique characters

days.title: Sliding Window - Part 2
days.description: Minimum window substring, max consecutive, container problems

tasks.title: LeetCode #11 - Container With Most Water
tasks.description: Find two lines that together with x-axis form max area

tasks.title: LeetCode #76 - Minimum Window Substring
tasks.description: Find minimum window containing all characters
tasks.keyTakeaway: Complex sliding window with frequency tracking

tasks.title: LeetCode #125 - Valid Palindrome
tasks.description: Check if string is palindrome (alphanumeric only)

tasks.title: LeetCode #242 - Valid Anagram
tasks.description: Check if two strings are anagrams
tasks.complexity: O(n) or O(n log n) time

tasks.title: LeetCode #49 - Group Anagrams
tasks.description: Group strings that are anagrams of each other

days.title: Array Manipulation & Merging
days.description: Merge sorted arrays, remove duplicates, rotation

tasks.title: LeetCode #88 - Merge Sorted Array
tasks.keyTakeaway: Three pointers from end (avoid extra space)

tasks.title: LeetCode #26 - Remove Duplicates from Sorted Array
tasks.description: Remove duplicates in-place, return new length

tasks.title: LeetCode #189 - Rotate Array
tasks.description: Rotate array right by k steps

tasks.title: Review & Reinforce Week 1
tasks.description: Revisit difficult problems from the week

weeks.title: Week 2: Linked Lists
weeks.description: Master linked list operations and pointer manipulation
goals: Master linked list operations and pointer manipulation
Understand dummy nodes and fast/slow pointers
Build confidence with reference-based data structures

tasks.title: Study Linked List Fundamentals
tasks.description: Singly vs doubly linked, operations (insert, delete, traverse)

tasks.title: LeetCode #21 - Merge Two Sorted Lists
tasks.description: Merge two sorted lists into one

tasks.title: LeetCode #141 - Linked List Cycle
tasks.description: Detect if list has a cycle

tasks.title: LeetCode #142 - Linked List Cycle II
tasks.description: Find the entry point of a cycle

tasks.title: LeetCode #19 - Remove Nth Node From End
tasks.description: Remove the Nth node from end of list

tasks.title: LeetCode #82 - Remove Duplicates from Sorted List II
tasks.description: Remove all duplicates from sorted list
tasks.keyTakeaway: Dummy node for handling edge cases

tasks.title: LeetCode #92 - Reverse Linked List II
tasks.description: Reverse a portion of a list
tasks.keyTakeaway: Reverse portion of list with pointers

tasks.title: LeetCode #2 - Add Two Numbers
tasks.description: Add two numbers represented as linked lists

tasks.title: LeetCode #143 - Reorder List
tasks.keyTakeaway: Find middle, reverse second half, merge

tasks.title: Rest and prepare for Week 3
tasks.description: Mental preparation for trees and graphs

weeks.title: Week 3: Trees & Graphs - Fundamentals
weeks.description: Master tree traversals and basic graph algorithms
goals: Master tree traversals and basic graph algorithms
Understand DFS, BFS, and recursion patterns
Practice tree properties and BST operations
Build foundation for advanced graph problems

tasks.title: Study Tree Fundamentals
tasks.description: Binary tree structure, properties, and operations

tasks.title: LeetCode #102 - Binary Tree Level Order Traversal
LeetCode #104 - Maximum Depth of Binary Tree
LeetCode #98 - Validate Binary Search Tree
tasks.description: Check if tree is a valid BST

tasks.title: LeetCode #700 - Search in a Binary Search Tree
tasks.description: Search for a value in BST

tasks.title: LeetCode #701 - Insert into a Binary Search Tree
LeetCode #112 - Path Sum
tasks.description: Check if root-to-leaf path sums to target

tasks.title: LeetCode #113 - Path Sum II
tasks.description: Find all root-to-leaf paths with target sum

tasks.title: LeetCode #437 - Path Sum III
tasks.description: Find paths with target sum anywhere in tree

tasks.title: Review Week 3 problems
tasks.description: Revisit challenging tree and graph problems

weeks.title: Week 4: Dynamic Programming - Part 1
goals: Understand overlapping subproblems and optimal substructure
Build foundation for advanced DP problems

tasks.title: LeetCode #70 - Climbing Stairs
tasks.description: Count ways to climb n stairs
tasks.complexity: O(n) time, O(n) or O(1) space

tasks.title: LeetCode #198 - House Robber
tasks.description: Max sum with no adjacent elements

tasks.title: LeetCode #139 - Word Break
tasks.description: Check if string can be segmented

tasks.title: LeetCode #97 - Interleaving String
tasks.description: Check if s3 is interleaving of s1 and s2

tasks.title: LeetCode #188 - Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock IV

weeks.title: Week 5: Greedy & Backtracking
weeks.description: Master greedy algorithms and backtracking techniques

tasks.title: LeetCode #1899 - Merge Triplets to Form Target Triplet
LeetCode #39 - Combination Sum
tasks.description: Find combinations that sum to target

weeks.title: Week 6: Advanced Data Structures
weeks.description: Master heaps, tries, and specialized data structures
goals: Master heap operations and priority queues

tasks.title: LeetCode #215 - Kth Largest Element
tasks.description: Find Kth largest element using min-heap

tasks.title: LeetCode #295 - Find Median from Data Stream
LeetCode #208 - Implement Trie (Prefix Tree)
tasks.complexity: O(m) insert/search where m is word length

tasks.title: LeetCode #211 - Design Add and Search Words
LeetCode #15 - 3Sum
tasks.description: Find all triplets that sum to zero

weeks.title: Week 7-8: System Design Fundamentals
goals: Prepare for real-world system design interviews

days.title: Scalability & Load Balancing
days.description: Horizontal vs vertical scaling and load balancing strategies

tasks.title: Study Scalability Basics
tasks.description: Vertical vs horizontal scaling, load balancing concepts

days.title: Database Design
days.description: SQL vs NoSQL and database selection

tasks.title: Study Database Fundamentals
tasks.description: Relational vs document databases, ACID, CAP theorem

tasks.title: Study Microservices
tasks.description: Service decomposition, API gateways, service discovery

days.title: Design Practice - Twitter
days.description: Design a social media feed system

weeks.title: Week 9: Behavioral & STAR Stories
weeks.description: Develop compelling behavioral stories using STAR method
goals: Master STAR method (Situation, Task, Action, Result)

days.title: Leadership & Initiative
days.description: Stories about leading teams and taking initiative

tasks.title: Develop Leadership Stories
tasks.description: Led team through deadline, made difficult decisions, mentored

days.title: Conflict Resolution
days.description: Stories about handling disagreements and difficult situations

tasks.title: Develop Conflict Stories
tasks.description: Disagreement with team, critical bugs, difficult stakeholders

tasks.title: Develop Failure Stories
tasks.description: Failed project, technical mistakes, skill gaps

tasks.title: Develop Technical Stories
tasks.description: System optimization, complex features, code quality

tasks.title: Develop Impact Stories
tasks.description: Business results, customer satisfaction, process improvement

tasks.title: Practice All Stories
tasks.description: Record and evaluate all behavioral stories

tasks.title: Final Polish
tasks.description: Refine delivery and timing of all stories

tasks.title: Mock Coding Interview 1
tasks.description: Timed LeetCode contest, focus on communication

tasks.title: Mock Coding Interview 2
tasks.description: Timed LeetCode contest, different problem set

tasks.title: Mock Coding Interview 3
tasks.description: Timed LeetCode contest with harder problems

tasks.title: Behavioral Interview Mock
tasks.description: Practice with friends or mock interview platform

tasks.title: Analyze Mock Performance
tasks.description: Identify weak areas and improvement opportunities

tasks.title: Arrays & Strings Review
tasks.description: Revisit difficult problems, practice 5 new ones

days.title: Linked Lists & Trees Deep Dive
days.description: Refresh linked list and tree operations

tasks.title: Linked Lists Review
tasks.description: Complex pointer operations and tree traversals

days.title: Trees & Graphs Deep Dive
days.description: Review BST operations and advanced graph algorithms

tasks.title: Trees & Graphs Review
tasks.description: Practice advanced tree and graph problems

days.title: DP Deep Dive
days.description: Revisit state transitions and hard DP problems

tasks.title: DP Review
tasks.description: Revisit state transitions, practice 3 hard DP problems

tasks.title: Greedy & Backtracking Review
tasks.description: Practice mixed greedy and backtracking problems

days.title: Data Structures Review
days.description: Practice with heaps, tries, and advanced structures

tasks.title: Polish Technical & Leadership Stories
tasks.description: Record and refine delivery, timing, and confidence

days.title: Edge Cases & Optimization
days.description: Review edge cases and optimization strategies

tasks.title: Final Full Mock
tasks.description: 45 min coding + 45 min design + 30 min behavioral

tasks.title: Final Rest Day
tasks.description: Light review only, mental preparation, sleep well!
